title: Archive Closeout Proof Report Prep
goal: Implement #471 by teaching archive closeout preparation to fill a compact proof_report when validation evidence is already present, so completed plans do not require manual JSON edits solely to satisfy archive validation.
non_goals: Do not invent or execute validation commands from the archive command.
Do not weaken archive validation for truly missing proof.
Do not make proof-report prose large or first-line startup input.

intent.outcome: A completed execplan with validation evidence can be archived with --prepare-closeout without manual proof_report patching.
intent.constraints: Keep proof_report compact and derived only from existing plan evidence.
intent.latitude: Choose a small normalized proof_report default using execution_summary, execution_run, or validation_commands evidence.
intent.escalation: Escalate if archive validation cannot distinguish missing proof from compact evidence.

execution.next_step: Archive this completed slice and continue with the next #450 child lane.
execution.proof: planning package tests, archive-plan focused tests, ruff, proof selector, planning surfaces

invariants: Archive validation still catches truly missing proof.
Prepared proof_report is compact and evidence-derived.
No validation command execution is hidden inside archive-plan.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: #450: make advanced features opt-in through feature tiers and merged surfaces.

required_continuation.required follow-on detail: #467/#469 remain after this slice unless validation proves they are satisfied or superseded.
required_continuation.activation trigger: after #471 closeout, refresh external evidence and promote the next #450 child indicated by validation

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: archive-plan --prepare-closeout can populate compact proof_report fields from existing validation evidence.
iterative_follow_through.discovered implications: Closeout is cheaper when validation evidence is recorded in execution_summary or execution_run before archive.
iterative_follow_through.proof achieved now: yes; planning package tests, ruff, planning-surface checks, proof selection, and planning doctor passed.
iterative_follow_through.next likely slice: refresh external evidence, then promote the next #450 child indicated by open issue state

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Archive closeout preparation should accept proof-report evidence.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Do not reduce archive proof trust or hide validation execution.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Which existing evidence fields should populate the compact proof_report.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: A plan has no validation evidence and archive would have to invent proof.

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Make the package streamlined, lightweight, frictionless, cheap, modular, and small while preserving leverage.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: Reduce closeout ceremony rather than adding new workflow surfaces.
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Can a validated milestone close with one archive command and no manual schema patch?

active_milestone.scope: Keep this execution thread bounded to the promoted TODO item.

immediate_next_action: Archive the completed plan with --prepare-closeout, refresh external evidence, and promote the next #450 child lane.
invariants: Archive validation still catches truly missing proof.
Prepared proof_report is compact and evidence-derived.
No validation command execution is hidden inside archive-plan.
validation_commands: cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py -q
cd packages/planning && uv run ruff check .
uv run ruff check packages/planning/src packages/planning/tests

uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/archive-closeout-proof-report-prep.plan.json packages/planning/src/repo_planning_bootstrap packages/planning/tests --format json
uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
completion_criteria: --prepare-closeout can populate proof_report from existing validation evidence.
Archive validation still fails when no proof or validation evidence exists.
Tests cover proof_report normalization and missing-proof behavior.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: archive-plan --prepare-closeout now derives compact proof_report fields from existing validation evidence without weakening missing-proof validation.
execution_summary.validation confirmed: uv run pytest packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py -q; cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py -q; cd packages/planning && uv run ruff check .; uv run ruff check packages/planning/src packages/planning/tests; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/archive-closeout-proof-report-prep.plan.json packages/planning/src/repo_planning_bootstrap packages/planning/tests --format json; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
execution_summary.post-work posterity capture: No durable docs or Memory promotion needed; tests and archived proof capture the reusable behavior.
execution_summary.resume from: next #450 child lane after external evidence refresh

execution_run.what happened: Added proof_report preparation from existing validation evidence and covered it with archive-plan tests while preserving missing-proof validation.
execution_run.scope touched: packages/planning archive closeout preparation plus focused tests and planning surfaces
execution_run.validations run: uv run pytest packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py -q; cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py -q; cd packages/planning && uv run ruff check .; uv run ruff check packages/planning/src packages/planning/tests; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/archive-closeout-proof-report-prep.plan.json packages/planning/src/repo_planning_bootstrap packages/planning/tests --format json; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
execution_run.next step: archive this plan, close #471, refresh external evidence, then continue the next open child lane
